payload.answer: Treat this as a job transition: mark Sam's employment at Goldman as no longer current and store Sam's employment at Point72 as the current fact.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same person and organizations as the existing fact, but updates employment status over time.

details: Detected a direct temporal update to an existing current employment fact.
Avoided keeping the superseded Goldman employment as current.
Stored Point72 as the current employer and Goldman as historical.

repair_options: Replace the current employer fact from Goldman to Point72.
Retain Goldman only as a past employer, not as a current employer.
If timestamps are supported, record the transition date when available.
